## Checklist

- [ ] I used official sources where relevant
- [ ] I updated the reference file if current policy changed
- [ ] I updated the `As of:` date for policy-sensitive reference files if needed
- [ ] I added or updated README entries if the visible skill list changed
- [ ] I validated any changed skills locally
